sentences: Aesop's fables often feature animals and teach a moral lesson. 伊索寓言常以動物為主角並教導道德教訓。
The story of the tortoise and the hare is a very famous ancient fable. 烏龜和兔子的故事是一個非常著名的古代寓言。
She chose a soft cotton fabric for her new summer dress. 她為自己的新夏裝選擇了柔軟的棉布料。
Trust and respect are essential elements in the fabric of a healthy society. 信任和尊重是健康社會結構中的基本元素。

meaning: 透過將各部分聯合起來形成一個整體；建造；建造。
sentences: to fabricate a bridge or ship 建造一座橋或船
People often fabricate when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會捏造事實。

meaning: 製造、框架或建造的行為；建造;製造。
sentences: the fabrication of a bridge, a church, or a government 建造橋樑、教堂或政府
The term fabrication refers to the act of fabricating, framing, or constructing; construction; manufacture. 「製造」一詞是指製造、框架或建造的行為；建造;生產。
We had a fabulous time at the party and met many interesting people. 我們在派對上度過了極好的時光，結識了許多有趣的人。
The hotel offers a fabulous view of the city skyline from its rooftop garden. 飯店頂層花園可以欣賞到絕佳的城市天際線景觀。

meaning: 建築物的正面，尤其是前視圖或立面圖。
sentences: The term facade refers to the face of a building, especially the front view or elevation. 術語「立面」是指建築物的正面，尤其是前視圖或立面圖。
The lesson introduced facade as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了外觀這個易於理解的有用術語。
He had a big smile on his face when he heard the news. 聽到消息時，他臉上帶著燦爛的笑容。
The house faces the ocean and has a wonderful view. 這間房子面向大海，風景優美。

meaning: 不具有或不透露任何個人身分或性格；匿名的。
sentences: A faceless mob attacked the Capitol building. 一群不露面的暴徒襲擊了國會大廈。
The report describes the result as faceless. 報告稱這一結果是不露面的。
the articular facet of a bone 骨頭的關節面
The term facet refers to A smooth circumscribed surface. 小面一詞是指光滑的外接表面。
She has very delicate facial features just like her beautiful mother. 她有著像她美麗母親一樣精緻的臉部特徵。
The suspect managed to hide his face to avoid facial recognition. 嫌疑人設法遮住臉部以避開人臉（臉部的）辨識。
The new software is designed to facilitate communication between team members. 這款新軟體旨在促進團隊成員之間的溝通。
Good infrastructure can help to facilitate economic growth in rural areas. 良好的基礎設施有助於促進農村地區的經濟成長。
The hotel provides various modern facilities to ensure guest comfort. 飯店提供各種現代化設施以確保客人的舒適。
The new sports facility includes a swimming pool and a gymnasium. 新的運動設施包含了游泳池與體育館。

meaning: 定位以便麵向（在特定方向）
sentences: (Concluded on facing page) （結束於對頁）
The report describes the result as facing. 報告將這一結果描述為「面臨」。
The museum displays a facsimile of the original document. 博物館展示了原始文件的副本。
Please send a facsimile of the contract to our office. 請將合約的傳真件寄到我們辦公室。
In fact, I have never been to London before. 事實上，我以前從未去過倫敦。
The book is based on real facts and historical events. 這本書是基於真實事實和歷史事件。
The political party was split into several rival factions over the new policy. 該政黨因新政策而分裂成幾個競爭對立的派別。
There was a lot of faction within the organization, which led to confusion. 組織內部存在很多內訌（派系鬥爭），導致了混亂。
Hard work is a major factor in achieving success in life. 努力工作是人生取得成功的一個主要因素。
Environmental factors play a vital role in human health. 環境因素在人類健康中發揮著至關重要的作用。
His father works in a large automobile factory. 他的父親在一家大型汽車廠工作。
The factory produces thousands of cellphones every day. 這家工廠每天生產數千部手機。

meaning: 內容是基於事實的節目，例如紀錄片。
sentences: The BBC is increasing its budget for factual this year. BBC 今年將增加紀實節目的預算。
The term factual refers to programmes having content based on facts, such as documentaries. 事實性一詞是指內容基於事實的節目，例如紀錄片。
He is a member of the faculty of arts at one of the most prestigious universities. 他是某知名大學文學院（系）的一員。
Despite his age, he still retains all his mental faculties and is very sharp. 儘管年事已高，他仍保有完整的智力（才能）且非常敏銳。
I hope this new health fad doesn't last long. 我希望這股新的健康狂熱不會持續太久。
Skinny jeans were a popular fad a few years ago. 緊身牛仔褲是幾年前流行的時尚。
The color of the curtains has faded due to the strong sunlight. 窗簾的顏色因為強烈陽光而褪色了。
His fears managed to fade away as soon as he saw her smile. 他一見到她的笑容，恐懼就漸漸消散了。

meaning: fade 的現在分詞和動名詞。
sentences: fading light; fading memory; fading reputation 光線逐漸暗淡；記憶力衰退；名譽衰退
People often fading when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會消失。
The temperature in the city reached ninety degrees Fahrenheit yesterday. 昨天的城市氣溫達到了華氏九十度。
Water freezes at thirty-two degrees Fahrenheit at standard pressure. 在標準大氣壓下，水在華氏三十二度時結冰。
He failed the driving test because he was too nervous. 他因為太緊張而沒通過駕駛考試。
Don't be afraid to fail; it's a part of learning. 不要害怕失敗，那是學習的一部分。

meaning: 如果接下來的事情不可能發生；沒有。
sentences: A large proportion of the females employed in other firms are said to have signified their intention of going on strike, failing a settlement. 據說，其他公司的女性員工大多表示要罷工，但未能達成和解。
The lesson introduced failing as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「失敗」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
Don't be afraid of failure; it is often a stepping stone to success. 不要害怕失敗；它往往是成功的墊腳石。
The project was a failure due to the lack of proper planning. 由於缺乏適當規劃，這個專案失敗了。
She felt very faint after standing in the hot sun for an hour. 在烈日下站了一個小時後，她感到一陣眩暈。
I could hear the faint sound of music coming from far away. 我能聽到遠處傳來微弱的音樂聲。

meaning: 以一種微弱的方式；非常安靜或輕輕地。
sentences: The team responded faintly to the change. 團隊對這項變化反應微弱。
She handled the problem faintly during the meeting. 會議期間她對這個問題的處理很淡定。
Everyone should have a fair chance to succeed in society. 每個人都應該在社會中享有公平的成功機會。
The weather forecast for the weekend is mostly fair and sunny. 週末的天氣預報大多為晴朗。

meaning: 不能共患難的朋友（酒肉朋友）
sentences: I realized he was just a fair-weather friend when he didn't help me when I was in trouble. 當他在我遇到困難時不幫我，我才發現他只是個不能共患難的朋友。
We don't need fair-weather friends around us. 我們不需要身邊有不能共患難的朋友。
The test was fairly difficult, but I think I managed to pass. 考試相當難，但我認為我設法通過了。
It's a fairly common mistake that many beginners often make. 這是許多初學者常犯的一個相當普遍的錯誤。
Some questioned the fairness of the new laws. 有些人質疑新法的公平性。
The term fairness refers to The property of being fair or equitable. 公平一詞是指公平或公正的性質。
My grandmother told me many fascinating fairy tales about dragons. 我祖母給我講了許多關於龍的精彩童話故事。
The little girl dressed up as a tiny fairy for the school party. 小女孩打扮成一個小仙女去參加學校派對。
It is my firm faith that education is the key to a better life. 我堅信教育是通向更美好生活的關鍵。
Trust and communication are essential for building lasting faith. 信任與溝通對於建立持久的信心至關重要。
He has been a faithful and loyal employee of the company for years. 他多年來一直是公司一位忠誠可靠（忠實）的員工。
She remained faithful to her principles even in the difficult situation. 即使在困難的情況下，她依然忠於（忠實於）自己的原則。
The CD reproduces music faithfully. CD 忠實地再現了音樂。
I have been faithfully married for the past twenty years. 在過去的二十年裡，我一直忠實地結婚。

meaning: 忠誠的狀態。守信的狀態或行為；持續的支持。
sentences: faithfulness to the original 忠於原著
The term faithfulness refers to The state of being faithful. The state or act of keeping faith; constancy of support. 忠誠一詞是指忠誠的狀態。守信的狀態或行為；持續的支持。
Be careful not to be fooled by fake news on social media. 小心別被社交媒體上的虛假新聞愚弄了。
He was caught trying to sell fake designer handbags at the market. 他在市場賣仿冒的名牌手提包時被抓住了。

meaning: 隼屬的任何鳥類，都是猛禽。
sentences: The term falcon refers to any bird of the genus Falco, all of which are birds of prey. 獵鷹一詞是指隼屬的任何鳥類，它們都是猛禽。
The lesson introduced falcon as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了獵鷹這個易於理解的有用術語。
The leaves turn yellow and fall from the trees in autumn. 秋天葉子變黃並從樹上落下。
Be careful not to fall on the slippery floor. 小心別在濕滑的地板上摔倒。

meaning: 欺騙性或虛假外表；誤導眼睛或心靈的東西。
sentences: The term fallacy refers to deceptive or false appearance; that which misleads the eye or the mind. 謬誤一詞是指欺騙性或虛假的表象；誤導眼睛或心靈的東西。
The lesson introduced fallacy as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了謬誤作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
fallen raindrops 落下的雨滴
Something described as fallen is having dropped by the force of gravity. 被描述為墜落的東西是由於重力而掉落的。

meaning: 秋天的現在分詞和動名詞
sentences: the falling prices of luxury goods 奢侈品價格下跌
People often falling when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們經常會跌倒。
He was accused of providing false information to the police. 他被指控向警方提供虛假資訊。
The statement he made during the meeting was completely false. 他在會議上發表的聲明完全是錯誤的。
He protested his innocence to the end, claiming he had been falsely charged and convicted. 他自始至終都堅稱自己無罪，聲稱自己受到了錯誤指控並被定罪。
If someone acts falsely, they do so in a way that is in a false manner. 如果有人做出錯誤的行為，他們就會以錯誤的方式行事。
His voice began to falter as he reached the most emotional part of his speech. 當他說到演講中最動情的部分時，聲音開始顫抖（結巴）。
The economy has begun to falter following the sudden financial crisis. 在突如其來的金融危機後，經濟已開始動搖（衰退）。
He achieved international fame after winning the prestigious award. 他在贏得這項享有盛譽的獎項後獲得了國際名聲。
Success is not just about wealth and fame, but also about contentment. 成功不僅僅在於財富與名聲，還在於滿足感。

meaning: 屬於或關於人類家庭的。
sentences: Mark had to leave work due to familial obligations. 由於家庭義務，馬克不得不辭去工作。
The report describes the result as familial. 該報告將這一結果描述為家族性的。
The city center felt very familiar to me, although I'd never been. 市中心對我來說感覺很熟悉，儘管我從未去過。
Is there any familiar face in the large crowd gathered here? 在這裡聚集的人群中有任何熟悉的面孔嗎？
His familiarity with local customs and traditions was a major asset. 他對當地習俗和傳統的熟悉是一大優勢。
The colleagues shared a sense of familiarity after working together for years. 同事們在共同工作多年後，有一種親密（熟悉）感。
I spent the Chinese New Year with my family in the countryside. 我和家人在鄉下度過了農曆新年。
Family is the most important thing in my life. 家庭是我生命中最重要的事情。
The term famine refers to extreme shortage of food in a region. 飢荒一詞是指一個地區食物極度短缺。
The lesson introduced famine as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了飢荒這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The city is famous for its historical monuments and delicious food. 這座城市以其歷史古蹟和美食聞名。
He became famous overnight after appearing on the TV show. 他在參加電視節目後一夜成名。
The new roommates got on famously. 新室友相處得很好。
If someone acts famously, they do so in a way that is really well, having great rapport. 如果某人的行為舉止出名，那麼他們的行為方式非常好，關係融洽。
He is a huge fan of rock music and has hundreds of CDs. 他是搖滾樂的忠實粉絲，收藏了數百張 CD。
Could you please turn on the electric fan? It's getting hot. 你可以開啟電風扇嗎？天氣變熱了。

meaning: 提出被神或惡魔附身的證據；瘋狂的，過度熱心的。
sentences: Something described as fanatic is showing evidence of possession by a god or demon; frenzied, overzealous. 被描述為狂熱的東西是顯示出被神或惡魔附身的證據；瘋狂的，過分熱心的。
The word fanatic is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 狂熱這個詞經常用來形容一個人、一件事或一種情況。

meaning: 對特定事業抱持極端的、非理性的熱情或熱情。
sentences: fanatical devotion 狂熱的奉獻
fanatical belief 狂熱的信仰

meaning: 富有想像或夢幻般的；忽視現實。
sentences: It was fanciful to suppose that all he had to do would be to stride into a top law firm and he would be hired on the spot. 認為他只要跨進一家頂級律師事務所就可以被錄用，這簡直是天方夜譚。
The report describes the result as fanciful. 報告稱這項結果是異想天開。
They went to a fancy Italian restaurant to celebrate the anniversary. 他們去了一家高級義大利餐廳慶祝週年。
Do you fancy going for a movie tonight? I'm feeling a bit bored. 你今晚想去看電影嗎？我感到有點無聊。

meaning: 體育、活動、工作、個人等的愛好者，作為一個群體。
sentences: The term fandom refers to the fans of a sport, activity, work, person etc., taken as a group. 「粉絲群」一詞是指作為一個群體的體育、活動、工作、個人等的粉絲。
The lesson introduced fandom as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了粉絲圈這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 吹響號角或號角以宣告；追逐時吹奏狩獵號角的短促而活潑的曲調。
sentences: They played a short fanfare to announce the arrival of the king. 他們演奏了一首簡短的樂曲來宣告國王的到來。
The term fanfare refers to a flourish of trumpets or horns as to announce; a short and lively air performed on hunting horns during the chase. 號角聲（fanfare）一詞是指用喇叭或號角來宣布的聲音；追逐時吹奏狩獵號角的短促而活潑的曲調。
The snake bared its fangs when it felt threatened. 這條蛇感到威脅時露出了毒牙。
The vampire characters in the movie have sharp fangs. 電影裡的吸血鬼角色有著尖銳的獠牙。
We had a fantastic time at the concert last night; it was amazing! 我們昨晚在音樂會上玩得很開心；簡直太棒了（極佳的）！
She gave a fantastic presentation that impressed everyone in room. 她做了一場精彩絕倫（極佳的）的簡報，給房間裡的每個人都留下了深刻印象。
He painted fantastically with everything as if in a dream. 他把一切都畫得夢幻般，就像在夢中一樣。
The team responded fantastically to the change. 團隊對這項變化做出了出色的反應。
The movie tells a beautiful and touching fantasy story about love. 這部電影講述了一個關於愛情的優美感人的幻想故事。
I have a secret fantasy of traveling around the entire world one day. 我有一個有一天環遊世界的秘密幻想。
How far is it from your house to the train station? 從你家到火車站有多遠？
The stars are very far away from the Earth. 星星距離地球非常遙遠。
The doctor confirmed that he is far-sighted and needs glasses for reading. 醫生確認他有遠視，閱讀時需要戴眼鏡。
She is a far-sighted leader who plans for the future. 她是一位有遠見的領導者，會為未來做計畫。

meaning: 精神不存在，就像做白日夢時一樣。
sentences: There was a faraway look on his face. 他的臉上浮現出一種遙遠的神情。
The report describes the result as faraway. 報告稱這項結果還很遙遠。
The trial was a complete farce. 那場審判完全是一場鬧劇。
The play was a hilarious farce that kept the audience laughing. 這部戲是一部令人捧腹的鬧劇，逗得觀眾大笑不止。
How much is the train fare from Taipei to Taichung? 從台北到台中的火車票價是多少？
Students are eligible for a discounted fare on public transport. 學生在大眾運輸上享有折扣票價。
The host said a warm farewell to all the guests as they left tonight. 賓客們今晚離開時，主人向他們溫暖地道別（告別）。
Everyone gathered to attend the farewell party for the manager today. 大家今天都聚在一起參加經理的告別派對。
They live on a large farm and grow various vegetables. 他們住在一個大農場，種植各種蔬菜。
The children enjoyed visiting the dairy farm last weekend. 孩子們上週末很喜歡參觀乳牛場。
The farmer works hard in the fields from dawn to dusk. 農夫從早到晚在田間辛勤工作。
Modern farmers use advanced machinery to improve efficiency. 現代農夫使用先進機械來提升效率。

meaning: 這棟房子曾經是農民的住所，但現在居住的居民不從事農業。
sentences: Since the farm's redevelopment into mixed commercial and residential space, the farmhouse has served as a community center. 自從農場重新開發為商業和住宅混合空間以來，農捨一直充當社區中心。
The couple live in a renovated farmhouse that was once the hub of a 300-acre farm. 這對夫婦住在一座經過翻修的農舍裡，這裡曾經是一個佔地 300 英畝的農場的中心。
The station was much farther than we had initially expected. 車站比我們最初預想的要遠得多。
He took a few steps farther into the dark and quiet forest. 他向黑暗寂靜的森林又走了幾步。
The mysterious ancient ruins have fascinated archaeologists for centuries. 神秘的古代遺址幾個世紀以來一直吸引著考古學家。
Children are often fascinated by animals and enjoy visiting the zoo. 孩子們常被動物深深吸引，喜歡去動物園。

meaning: 具有有趣的品質；迷人的；吸引人的。
sentences: The documentary was absolutely fascinating. 這部紀錄片絕對令人著迷。
He told a fascinating story about his travels. 他講述了一個關於他的旅行的有趣故事。
She has a lifelong fascination with ancient history and archaeology. 她一生都對古代歷史和考古學充滿著迷。
The mysterious ruins exert a strange fascination over everyone who visits. 神秘的遺址對每位參訪者都散發出一種奇特的魅力。

meaning: 這個名字來自於20世紀義大利運動的意識形態和實踐。
sentences: The term fascism refers to the ideology and practice of the 20th-century Italian movement from which this name came. 法西斯主義一詞指的是 20 世紀義大利運動的意識形態和實踐，這個名稱就是由此而來。
The lesson introduced fascism as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了法西斯主義作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 不公平的壓迫或不必要的嚴格。
sentences: I have a fascist boss. 我有一個法西斯老闆。
Something described as fascist is unfairly oppressive or needlessly strict. 被描述為法西斯主義的東西是不公平的壓迫或不必要的嚴格。
She is very interested in modern fashion and clothing design. 她對現代時尚與服裝設計非常感興趣。
The style of clothing was very fashionable back in the 1920s. 這種服裝風格在 1920 年代非常流行。

Please save the file on your computer and send it to me. 請將檔案存在你的電腦上並傳送給我。
The office has hundreds of files organized in the cabinets. 辦公室裡有數百份檔案整齊地收納在櫃子中。

meaning: 任何已被 檔案 或類似 實作 刪除的 reltle=pixel="le/artle); href="/wiki/shaving" title="shaving">剃鬚 。
sentences: The process left metal filings all over the bench and the part. 過程在工作台和零件上留下了金屬 銼屑 。 該過程在工作台和零件上留下了金屬屑。 過程在工作台和零件上留下了金屬銼屑。
The term filing refers to Any particle that has been removed by a file or similar implement; a shaving. 歸檔一詞是指任何已被 檔案 或類似 工具 刪除的 剃须 。 銼削一詞是指用銼刀或類似工具去除的任何顆粒；剃鬚。 歸檔是指任何已被歸檔或類似工具刪除的剃鬚。
Please fill the glass with water for our guest. 請幫客人把杯子倒滿水。
He had to fill out a long application form for the job. 他不得不填寫一份長長的求職申請表。
The whole building was filled with thick smoke. 整棟建築 充滿 濃煙。 整棟大樓充滿了濃濃的煙霧。 整棟建築充滿濃煙。
The report describes the result as filled. 報告將結果描述為已滿。 報告將結果描述為已滿。 報告將結果描述為已滿。

meaning: 添加相對惰性的成分以改變物理特性；填充劑。
sentences: The term filler refers to a relatively inert ingredient added to modify physical characteristics; a bulking agent. 術語「填料」是指為了改變物理特性而添加的相對惰性的成分；填充劑。
The lesson introduced filler as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了填充物作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 用於填充牙齒空腔的任何材料或使用此類材料的結果。
sentences: I will be using a rapid-setting cement filling. 我將使用速凝水泥填充物。
My temporary filling fell out and got lost. 我的臨時填充物掉落並丟失了。

meaning: 一個年輕、有魅力的女人。
sentences: Hey, Homer, get a load of the gams on that filly! 嘿，荷馬，讓那匹母馬盡情玩耍吧！
The term filly refers to a young, attractive woman. 「小雌馬」一詞指的是年輕、有魅力的女性。
What is your favorite film of all time? 你最喜歡的電影是哪一部？
The surface of the pond was covered with a thin film of oil. 池塘表面覆蓋著薄薄的一層油。
The water needs to be filtered to remove impurities before it is safe to drink. 水需要過濾以去除雜質，然後才能安全飲用。
Sunlight filtered through the thick leaves of the trees in the forest. 陽光透過樹林茂密的葉子過濾（滲）了下來。

meaning: 污垢；污物；弄髒或玷污的東西。
sentences: Before we start cooking we need to clean up the filth in this kitchen. 在我們開始做飯之前，我們需要清理廚房裡的污物。
The term filth refers to dirt; foul matter; that which soils or defiles. 污穢一詞指的是污垢；污物；弄髒或玷污的東西。
Something described as filthy is covered with filth; very dirty. 被描述為骯髒的東西被污穢所覆蓋；很髒。
The word filthy is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 骯髒這個詞常用來形容人、事或情況。

meaning: 過濾的行為或過程；將液體與漂浮在其中的不溶解顆粒進行機械分離。
sentences: The term filtration refers to the act or process of filtering; the mechanical separation of a liquid from the undissolved particles floating in it. 術語「過濾」是指過濾的行為或過程；將液體與漂浮在其中的未溶解顆粒進行機械分離。
The lesson introduced filtration as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了過濾這個易於理解的有用術語。
The shark's sharp dorsal fin could be seen clearly above the water. 鯊魚尖銳的背鰭可以清晰地在水面上看到。
The diver watched as the large fish moved its fins and swam away. 潛水員看著那條大魚擺動魚鰭游走了。
The final decision on the project will be made at tomorrow's meeting. 專案的最終決定將在明天的會議上做出。
I'm currently studying hard for my final English exam next week. 我目前正為下週的期末英文考試努力唸書。

meaning: 某事的盛大結局，尤其是一場演出或一首音樂的盛大結局。
sentences: The term finale refers to the grand end of something, especially of a show or piece of music. 結局一詞指的是某件事的盛大結局，尤其是一場表演或一首音樂。
The lesson introduced finale as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了結局作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 正在學習最後一年的大學生；一名高級。
sentences: The term finalist refers to a university student in their final year of study; a senior. 「決賽入圍者」一詞是指處於最後一年學習的大學生；一位前輩。
The lesson introduced finalist as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了決賽入圍者作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 使最終的或確定的；完成或完成。
sentences: As soon as we get the plane tickets, we'll finalize our reservations with the hotel. 拿到機票後，我們就和飯店確定預訂。
People often finalize when the situation calls for it. 人們通常會在情況需要時做出最終決定。
After hours of discussion, they finally reached an agreement. 經過數小時的討論，他們終於達成了協議。
We finally arrived at our destination after a long journey. 經過長途跋涉，我們終於到達了目的地。
The government is taking steps to stimulate international finance. 政府正採取措施刺激國際金融。
Starting your own business requires a significant amount of finance. 創業需要大量的資金（金融）。
The company reported a significant increase in financial profit now. 公司現在報告其財務（金融的）利潤大幅增加。
He works as a senior financial advisor at an international firm. 他在一家國際公司擔任高級財務顧問。
He helped his daughter out financially, paying her rent and utilities, until she recovered from the accident. 他在經濟上幫助女兒擺脫困境，支付她的房租和水電費，直到她從事故中康復。
If someone acts financially, they do so in a way that is in terms of finance or money. 如果某人在財務上採取行動，他們會以財務或金錢的方式這樣做。

meaning: 一名負責財務管理；管理公共收入的官員；財務主管。
sentences: The term financier refers to one charged with the administration of finance; an officer who administers the public revenue; a treasurer. 金融家一詞是指負責財務管理的人；管理公共收入的官員；財務主管。
The lesson introduced financier as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了金融家這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 任何歐亞金翅雀（Caruelis carduelis 種，同義詞 Fringilla carduelis）。
sentences: The term finch refers to any Eurasian goldfinch (of species Carduelis carduelis, syn. Fringilla carduelis). 雀科一詞是指任何歐亞金翅雀（屬於 Carduelis carduelis 種，同義詞 Fringilla carduelis）。
The lesson introduced finch as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了芬奇這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
I can't find my keys anywhere; have you seen them? 我到處找不到我的鑰匙，你看到了嗎？
It's difficult to find a good parking space in the city center. 在市中心很難找到好的停車位。

meaning: 發現或發現某事的人；發現者。
sentences: Finders keepers, losers weepers. 勝利者守門，失敗者哭泣。
The term finder refers to one who finds or discovers something; a discoverer. 發現者一詞指發現或發現某物的人；一個發現者。
The term finding refers to A result of research or an investigation. 「發現」一詞是指研究或調查的結果。
We learned the meaning of finding during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學習了尋找的意義。
The weather is fine today, so let's go for a picnic. 今天天氣很好，我們去野餐吧。
He had to pay a heavy fine for speeding on the highway. 他因為在高速公路上超速而不得不支付一筆鉅額罰款。

meaning: 從而產生細膩的質感；切成小、薄或精緻的碎片。
sentences: Fledglings can only be fed finely chopped meat. 雛鳥只能餵切碎的肉。
If someone acts finely, they do so in a way that is so as to produce a fine texture; into small, thin, or delicate pieces. 如果一個人的行為很好，那麼他的行為方式就是為了產生良好的質感；切成小、薄或精緻的碎片。
The term finer refers to one who fines or purifies. 精細一詞指的是精細或淨化的人。
The lesson introduced finer as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「finer」這個術語，它是一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 小心或熟練地處理或管理；以狡猾的方式操縱。
sentences: To finesse means to handle or manage carefully or skilfully; to manipulate in a crafty way. 技巧意味著小心或熟練地處理或管理；以狡猾的方式操縱。
People may finesse in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據具體情況在不同的情況下採取策略。
She wore a beautiful diamond ring on her finger. 她在手指上戴了一枚漂亮的鑽石戒指。
Be careful not to cut your finger with the sharp knife. 小心別被那把鋒利的刀割傷了手指。

meaning: 使用手指演奏樂器的特定方法。
sentences: That chord has two fingerings. 這個和弦有兩個指法。
The term fingering refers to A specific method of using the fingers to play an instrument. 指法一詞是指使用手指演奏樂器的特定方法。
She painted her fingernails bright red. 她把指甲染成鮮紅色。
He has a habit of biting his fingernails when he is nervous. 他緊張時有咬指甲的習慣。

meaning: 用於識別某物的獨特特徵組合。
sentences: acoustic fingerprint 聲指紋
The term fingerprint refers to a unique combination of features that serves as an identification of something. 術語「指紋」是指用作識別某物的特徵的獨特組合。
I need to finish my homework before I can watch TV. 我需要先做完功課才能看電視。
When will you finish your project? 你什麼時候會完成你的專案？

meaning: 已完成; 結論; <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="/="done" 完成。
sentences: I won't be finished until just before lunch. 直到午餐前我才會 完成 。 直到午餐前我才會完成。 直到午餐前我才會完成。
The program was finally finished after three hours. 經過三個小時，節目終於 完成了 。 經過三個小時，節目終於結束了。 經過三個小時，節目終於完成了。
The early finishers waited for the other runners to reach the finish line. 較早到達終點的選手等待其他選手到達終點。
The term finisher refers to a person who finishes or completes something. 術語“完成者”指完成或完成某事的人。
The earth's natural resources are finite, and we must use them wisely. 地球的自然資源是有限的，我們必須明智地使用它們。
The human lifespan is finite, which is why we should cherish every moment. 人的壽命是有限的，這就是為什麼我們應該珍惜每一刻。
The mountains are covered with evergreen fir trees. 山上覆蓋著常綠的冷杉樹。
A tall fir tree stood in front of the house. 房前矗立著一棵高大的冷杉。
Don't play with matches; you might start a fire. 不要玩火柴，你可能會引起火災。
The building was destroyed by a massive fire last night. 那棟建築昨晚被一場大火摧毀了。
You need a license to own a firearm in this country. 在這個國家擁有槍支需要許可證。
Police recovered several illegal firearms during the raid. 警方在突擊行動中查獲了幾支非法槍支。
The car swerved off a road, hit a wall, and fireballed as the petrol tank exploded. 汽車突然衝出道路，撞到牆上，油箱爆炸，產生火球。
People often fireball when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會火冒三丈。
The children enjoyed setting off colorful firecrackers during the festival. 孩子們喜歡在節慶期間燃放彩色的鞭炮（爆竹）。
The loud sound of firecrackers filled the air in the small village yesterday. 昨天小村莊裡到處都是響亮的鞭炮聲。

meaning: 螢科甲蟲，在黃昏時表現出生物發光。
sentences: The term firefly refers to any beetle of the family Lampyridae, which exhibit bioluminescence during twilight. 螢火蟲一詞指的是螢科的任何甲蟲，它們在黃昏時表現出生物發光。
The lesson introduced firefly as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了螢火蟲作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The firemen worked hard to put out the forest fire. 消防員們努力撲滅森林大火。
A young boy said he wanted to become a fireman when he grows up. 一個小男孩說他長大後想成為一名消防員。
The brave firemen rescued the family from the burning building. 勇敢的消防員從燃燒的建築中救出了那家人。
She dreamed of becoming a firewoman and serving her community. 她夢想成為一名消防員並服務她的社區。
We spent the whole evening sitting near the warm stone fireplace. 我們整個晚上都坐在溫暖的石造壁爐旁。
The children were happily decorating the fireplace for Christmas. 孩子們正開心地裝飾壁爐準備過聖誕節。
The company is required by law to have fireproof storage for documents. 法律要求公司必須備有防火的檔案儲存空間。
Firefighters wear special fireproof clothing to protect themselves from heat. 消防員穿著特殊的防火服以保護自己免受熱浪傷害。

meaning: 用於燃燒的木材，通常用於取暖。
sentences: After many days of hard work, we finally had enough firewood for the winter. 經過多日的辛苦，我們終於有了足夠過冬的柴火。
The term firewood refers to wood intended to be burned, typically for heat. 木柴一詞是指用於燃燒的木材，通常用於取暖。
The sky was lit up by a spectacular firework display at midnight. 午夜時分，壯觀的煙火表演點亮了天空。
The children were very excited to see the colorful fireworks. 孩子們非常興奮能看到五彩繽紛的煙火。

meaning: 透過加熱或火（尤其是黏土等）來生產陶器的過程。
sentences: After the pots have been glazed, they go back into the kiln for a second firing. 罐子上釉後，會被送回窯中進行第二次燒製。
The term firing refers to The process of applying heat or fire, especially to clay, etc., to produce pottery. 燒製一詞是指利用熱或火，特別是對黏土等進行加熱或火來生產陶器的過程。
He works as a successful lawyer in a large international law firm. 他在一家大型國際律師事務所擔任成功的律師。
You need to have a firm belief in yourself to achieve your goals. 你需要對自己有堅定的信念才能實現目標。
to put on a firmer footing 站穩腳步
The report describes the result as firmer. 報告稱結果更加堅定。

meaning: 以堅定或明確或強烈的方式。
sentences: She corrected him firmly but gently. 她堅定但溫和地糾正了他。
If someone acts firmly, they do so in a way that is in a firm or definite or strong manner. 如果某人行動堅定，他們就會以堅定、明確或強烈的方式這樣做。
January is the first month of the year. 一月是一年中的第一個月。
First, you need to preheat the oven to 180 degrees. 首先，你需要將烤箱預熱到 180 度。
Everyone should learn basic first-aid skills. 每個人都應該學習基本的急救技能。
She carried a small first-aid kit in her car. 她在車裡帶了一個小急救箱。

meaning: 以前沒有擁有或使用過；與二手相比。
sentences: a firsthand copy 第一手副本
Something described as firsthand is not previously owned or used; contrasted with secondhand. 被描述為第一手的東西是指以前沒有擁有或使用過的東西；與二手貨對比。
If someone acts firstly, they do so in a way that is in the first place; before anything else; first. 如果某人先採取行動，那麼他們就會以首先的方式行事；首先；第一的。
The speaker responded firstly during the discussion. 討論中，發言人先做出回應。
The government announced several new fiscal measures to reduce the national debt. 政府公佈了幾項新的財政措施以減少國債。
The company's fiscal year ends on December 31st every year. 公司的會計年度於每年的 12 月 31 日結束。
My father likes to go fishing at the lake on weekends. 我父親喜歡在週末去湖邊釣魚。
Salmon is a very healthy kind of fish to eat. 鮭魚是一種非常健康的食用魚類。

meaning: 捕魚的人，尤其是為了謀生或為了運動而捕魚的人；從事釣魚消遣的人。
sentences: The term fisher refers to a person who catches fish, especially for a living or for sport; a person engaging in the pastime of fishing. 漁民一詞指的是捕魚的人，尤其是為了謀生或為了娛樂而捕魚的人；從事釣魚消遣的人。
The lesson introduced fisher as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了費雪這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The old fisherman spent the entire day out at sea on his boat. 老漁夫整天都在海上駕船捕魚。
Fishermen in this village use traditional nets to catch salmon. 這個村莊的漁夫使用傳統網具捕撈鮭魚。
The local fishery provides fresh seafood to many restaurants in the city. 當地的漁場（漁業）為市內的許多餐廳提供新鮮海鮮。
Overfishing is a major threat to the sustainability of global fisheries. 過度捕撈是對全球漁業永續發展的主要威脅。
We had a good day's fishing at the weekend. 週末我們釣魚了一天。
The term fishing refers to The act of catching fish. 釣魚一詞是指捕魚的行為。
What is that fishy odor? 那股魚腥味是什麼？
Something described as fishy is of, from, or similar to fish. 被描述為「腥味」的東西屬於魚、來自魚或與魚相似。
Nuclear fission provides a significant amount of energy. 核分裂提供了大量的能量。
The process of cell fission is fundamental to life. 細胞分裂過程是生命的基礎。
The app has a fissionable interface for new users. 這個 App 的介面對新手來說很fissionable。
We need a more fissionable plan before launch day. 在上線前，我們需要一個更fissionable的計畫。
He hit the table with his fist in anger after hearing the news. 聽到消息後，他憤怒地用拳頭敲桌子。
Please keep your fists closed and stay focused during the match. 比賽期間請緊握拳頭並保持專注。
These new shoes don't fit me properly; they are a bit too tight. 這些新鞋不太合腳；有點太緊了。
Regular exercise and a balanced diet are essential to stay fit. 定期運動與均衡飲食對於保持健康體態至關重要。

meaning: 雞貂，如歐洲雞貂 (Mustela putorius)、條紋雞貂、草原雞貂或美洲黑足雞貂。
sentences: The term fitch refers to a polecat, such as the European polecat (Mustela putorius), the striped polecat, steppe polecat, or black-footed polecat of America. 術語「fitch」指的是雞貂，例如歐洲雞貂（Mustela putorius）、條紋雞貂、草原雞貂或美洲黑腳雞貂。
The lesson introduced fitch as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 fitch 作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
Regular exercise is important for maintaining physical fitness. 規律運動對於保持身體健康至關重要。
The doctor questioned his fitness to return to work. 醫生質疑他是否適合恢復工作。
a fitter of clothing, or of machinery 服裝或機械裝配工
The term fitter refers to a person who fits or assembles something. 「裝配工」一詞是指裝配或組裝某物的人。
The child is five years old today. 這孩子今天五歲了。
There are five people in our family. 我們家有五口人。
The mechanic managed to fix the broken engine in just one hour. 技師在短短一小時內就修好了壞掉的引擎。
Please help me fix this picture to the wall with some adhesive tape. 請幫我用膠帶把這張照片固定在牆上。

meaning: 以表達媒介錄製創意作品一段時間以上，從而滿足版權法中的「固定」要求。
sentences: In order to obtain copyright on a recording in the United States, the recording must have been reduced to fixation on or after February 15, 1972. 為了在美國獲得錄音的版權，該錄音必須在 1972 年 2 月 15 日或之後錄製。

The study aims to further our understanding of human brain functions. 該研究旨在增進我們對人類大腦功能的了解。
He is very hardworking; furthermore, he has many years experience. 他非常努力；另外（此外），他還有多年的經驗。
The movie was long; furthermore, it was very dull and boring today. 那部電影很長；此外（另外），它今天感覺非常乏味無聊。

meaning: 在時間、空間或程度上最遙遠。
sentences: The furthest known galaxy is about 13 billion light years from Earth. 已知最遠的星系距離地球約130億光年。
Something described as furthest is most distant in time, space or degree. 被描述為最遠的事物在時間、空間或程度上是最遙遠的。
He was trembling with fury when he discovered that his car had been stolen. 當他發現車被偷時，氣得渾身發抖（狂怒）。
The storm hit the coastal village with a sudden and destructive fury. 風暴以突如其來的毀滅性威力（激烈狀態）襲擊了海濱村莊。
The lights went out because a fuse had blown in the electrical box. 燈滅了，因為電箱裡的保險絲燒斷了。
The project aims to fuse traditional craftsmanship with modern design. 該專案旨在將傳統工藝與現代設計相融合。
The aircraft's fuselage was damaged during the emergency landing. 飛機機身在緊急著陸時損壞了。
The engineers are inspecting the structure of the fuselage. 工程師正在檢查機身的結構。

meaning: 一種融合不同流派的音樂風格；尤其是不同類型的爵士樂和雷鬼音樂。
sentences: The term fusion refers to a style of music that blends disparate genres; especially different types of jazz and reggae. 融合一詞是指融合不同流派的音樂風格。尤其是不同類型的爵士樂和雷鬼音樂。
The lesson introduced fusion as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了融合作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
Stop making such a fuss about a small scratch on your new car. 不要為你新車上的小刮痕這麼大驚小怪（小題大作）。
My mother always makes a fuss over us whenever we go back home. 每次我們回家，我媽媽總是對我們關懷備至（大驚小怪地忙活）。

meaning: 沒有能力產生結果，無用；注定不會成功；不值得嘗試。
sentences: Something described as futile is incapable of producing results, useless; doomed not to be successful; not worth attempting. 形容無用的東西是不能產生結果的，無用的；注定不會成功；不值得嘗試。
The word futile is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 徒勞這個字常用來形容人、事或情況。
an exercise of futility 徒勞的練習
His taking the bar exam for a third time was pure futility. 他第三次參加律師考試完全是徒勞無功。
I slept on a comfortable futon during my trip to Japan. 我在日本旅行期間睡在舒適的日式床墊上。
She bought a stylish futon sofa for her guest room. 她為客房買了一張時尚的日式床墊沙發。
We are planning for our future and saving money for a new house. 我們正在規劃未來，並為買新房存錢。
Who knows what will happen in the future? 誰知道未來會發生什麼事呢？

meaning: 技術、概念等先進得似乎來自未來。
sentences: Something described as futuristic is of technology, a concept, etc, so far advanced as to appear to be from the future. 被描述為未來主義的東西是指技術、概念等，如此先進以至於看起來來自未來。
The word futuristic is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 未來主義這個字常用來描述人、事物或情況。

meaning: 一小塊毛絨材料，例如棉絨。
sentences: You've got a fuzzy on your coat. 你的外套上有毛茸茸的東西。
The term fuzzy refers to a very small piece of plush material such as lint. 術語“毛絨”是指非常小的一塊毛絨材料，例如棉絨。
